title: goniophlebium triseriale
intro: Goniophlebium triseriale is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other health issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction by boiling the leaves in water, or sometimes in combination with other herbs, to make a tea that is consumed for its medicinal benefits.
